name: Dirt
short_description: Fight for the freedom. In this pixel-art JRPG, you will play as a young boy who has lost all his memories. Embark on a journey to become a hero and save the world, fight against the absurd fate that governs you, and ultimately uncover the truth about both this world and yourself.
detailed_description:
Dirt

When you wake up, you find yourself devoid of all memories, strictly watched over by an old man. Through a diary, you learn your supposed mission—to become a hero and save the world.

But what awaits you is far from the journey you expected...

Dirt is a hand-drawn pixel-art JRPG where both the art style and the enemies you face are as absurd as they are eerie. Explore a world steeped in nostalgia, accompanied by retro music. The gameplay is based on a classic turn-based strategy battle system, making it easy to pick up. The story revolves around a deep exploration of freedom, using absurd storytelling to provoke serious thought, ultimately revealing the truth about both the world and yourself.

Game Features

  • Gameplay: Turn-based strategy combat, story-driven experience

  • Art Style: Hand-drawn, pixel-art, eerie and surreal

  • Music: Nostalgic, retro soundtrack

  • Story: Five narrative-rich chapters, absurd storytelling, profound exploration of freedom and fate. Three endings: Real End (Mars Colonization), Normal End (Return to Reality), and True End (Journey to Find the Soul). Please clear True End.

Five Story Chapters

  • Awakening: Wake up in a cozy little house and uncover the enemies you'll soon face.

  • Betrayal: Six months later, discover the corpses of your companions in a goblin nest, hunt down the killer, and avenge them.

  • Escape: Retrieve your stolen eyes and break free from the Grand Prison.

  • Confrontation: Defeat the King of the Undead and save the world!

  • Revelation: Uncover the truth about this world—and yourself. Make your final choice.
